title: Car rental options in Buenos Aires

validation.onlineBookingRequirement: Official website or app must support online reservation/booking (date search, booking flow, or confirmed online reserve), not phone/WhatsApp-only quotes.
researchSources: Google Places API text search and place details
Official tourism list: turismo.buenosaires.gob.ar alquiler de autos
Direct website checks for online booking widgets

excluded.name: CarzRental (Ramsay 1810)
excluded.reason: Open Sunday with 658 reviews, but booking is a WhatsApp quote broker form for international rentals rather than local BA fleet online reservation.

excluded.name: Avis Centro / Budget Centro / SIXT Centro / Localiza Centro / Omega
excluded.reason: Google Maps hours show closed on Sundays for the main city desks checked.

excluded.name: Localiza Ezeiza
excluded.reason: Open Sunday, but under 150 Google Maps reviews (99).

excluded.name: FIT Car Rental
excluded.reason: Open Sunday per Maps, but under 150 reviews.

excluded.name: Go! Rent a Car / Travel Rent A Car / URBAN RENT A CAR / Omega branches
excluded.reason: 150+ reviews in some cases, but not open Sundays on Google Maps.

excluded.name: Enterprise Aeroparque / Enterprise Ezeiza
excluded.reason: Open Sunday with online booking, but under 15 Google Maps reviews (5 each).

excluded.name: National Aeroparque / National Ezeiza
excluded.reason: Open Sunday with online booking, but under 15 Google Maps reviews (5 and 4).

excluded.name: Budget Ezeiza
excluded.reason: Open Sunday with online booking, but under 15 Google Maps reviews (12).

airportBrandException.requirement: Sunday-open airport desks for Avis/Budget/Alamo/Enterprise/National are included from 15+ Google Maps reviews when online booking is available.

currency.rateNote: ARS quotes converted at ARS 1,510 per USD for approximate USD labels.

pricing.metric: Approximate 1-day rate for the smallest SUV class each company offers
pricing.includes: Published all-in day rate with taxes/fees as shown by the source. Credit-card deposit, deductible/franchise, extras (GPS, additional driver, young driver, one-way, after-hours) usually extra.
primarySources: Rentcars brand pages for Buenos Aires (ARS 'Desde …/día' SUV)
Company fleet pages where no public rate was published
